key_concepts: Instead of defining one-hot matrices, we define a small trainable matrix of continuous vectors attached to each discrete category.
The neural network learns the precise continuous dimensions representing similarity amongst categories during training.
The first major leap from designed representations to fully learned representation for categorical variables.

definitions.definition: Pembentukan vektor representasi padat berkelanjutan untuk tipe pengamatan kategori nominal mentah yang disesuaikan mesin mandiri selama simulasi berjalan.

examples: Mapping the weekdays 'Sunday' and 'Saturday' mathematically closer together than 'Wednesday', completely formulated automatically.

relations.builds_toward: Bagian V (deep learning representations in chapter 15)
